Terms.title: Terms and Conditions of Use
Terms.helpText: If you have any questions regarding our Terms, our team is at your disposal.

introduction.title: Introduction and acceptance
introduction.p1: These General Terms and Conditions of Use (hereinafter referred to as 'GTCU') are intended to define the terms and conditions under which the NESTHUB platform makes its real estate matching services available to its users in Tunisia.
introduction.p2: By accessing or using the NESTHUB website, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not accept these conditions, you must not use our services.
introduction.warning: These GTCU apply to all users of the platform: tenants, owners, and unconnected visitors.

services.title: Description of services
services.description: NESTHUB is a Tunisian technology platform facilitating real estate rental between individuals. Our services include, but are not limited to:
services.item1: Publication of rental ads with photos, videos, and detailed descriptions.
services.item2: A secure messaging system with anti-data-leak detection.
services.item3: A booking management tool and digital rental files.
services.item4: Secure payment solutions via Konnect, with security deposit management.
services.item5: An identity verification system via OCR (ID card / Passport).
services.item6: A reliability score and trust badges for verified users.
services.item7: Artificial intelligence tools for fraud detection and recommendations.

owners.title: Owners
owners.item1: Provide accurate and truthful information about the property.
owners.item2: Legally hold the rental rights to the published property.
owners.item3: Comply with decency standards and Tunisian legislation.
owners.item4: Do not publish fictitious or misleading ads.
owners.item5: Respond to booking requests within a reasonable time.

tenants.title: Tenants
tenants.item2: Use the platform fairly and honestly.
tenants.item3: Make all payments exclusively via NESTHUB.
tenants.item4: Respect the internal regulations of the rented property.
tenants.item5: Report any problems through official channels.

prohibited.title: Prohibited behaviors
prohibited.text: It is strictly forbidden to share personal contact details (numbers, emails, IBAN) in messaging, to bypass the payment system, to post false ads, or to harass other users. Any breach may result in the suspension or permanent banning of the account.

paiements.title: Financial Conditions
paiements.quote: The security of your transactions is our priority. All payments made on NESTHUB are processed by Konnect, an approved payment provider in Tunisia.

commission.title: Service commissions
commission.text: NESTHUB charges a 20% commission on each transaction. It is automatically deducted from the amount paid to the owner and clearly displayed before any confirmation.

deposit.title: Security deposit (Escrow)
deposit.text: The security deposit is collected at the time of payment and placed in escrow. It is automatically returned at the end of the stay without dispute, or arbitrated by NESTHUB in case of conflict with photo evidence.

payout.title: Payments to owners
payout.text: Payments are made after check-in confirmation, with a minimum threshold of 50 DT. A detailed statement is available in the owner dashboard.

refund.title: Refunds
refund.text: Refunds are calculated according to the owner's cancellation policy. The processing time is 3 to 5 business days. NESTHUB can force a refund in case of proven dispute.

responsabilite.title: Limitation of Liability
responsabilite.description: NESTHUB acts as a content host and technical intermediary. The platform cannot be held responsible for:
responsabilite.item1: The content of ads published by users.
responsabilite.item2: The non-performance or improper performance of the lease concluded between the parties.
responsabilite.item3: Indirect damages resulting from the use of the service.
responsabilite.item4: Temporary service interruptions for maintenance or force majeure.
responsabilite.item5: The quality, compliance, or actual condition of the properties offered for rent.

resiliation.title: Termination
resiliation.description: The user can delete their account at any time from their settings. NESTHUB reserves the right to suspend or terminate any account in case of:

reason3.title: System circumvention
reason3.desc: Payments or contact sharing outside NH.

resiliation.process: Termination follows the progressive escalation process: warning → temporary suspension → permanent ban, except for serious fraud justifying immediate action.

donnees.title: Personal data
donnees.description: NESTHUB is committed to protecting your personal data. Your rights include:
donnees.footer: To exercise your rights, see our

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.description: At NestHub, the protection of your personal data is an absolute priority. This policy details how we collect, use, and protect your information, in accordance with current regulations.
Privacy.helpText: Questions about your data? Our DPO is at your disposal.

collecte.title: Collection of personal data
collecte.description: We collect information you provide directly to us when creating your account, publishing an ad, or requesting a rental:

identite.label: Identity
identite.desc: First name, last name, date of birth.

coordonnees.label: Contact details
coordonnees.desc: Email address, phone number, postal address.

profil.label: Profile
profil.desc: Photograph, bio, tenant type, search preferences, rental history.

documents.label: Identity documents
documents.desc: ID card or Passport uploaded for OCR verification. Encrypted storage.

financieres.label: Financial data
financieres.desc: Payment history via Konnect (no banking data stored).

comportementales.label: Behavioral data
comportementales.desc: Search history, viewed ads, completed bookings, reviews.

messagerie.label: Messaging data
messagerie.desc: Exchanges analyzed by anti-leak AI to block data sharing.

utilisation.title: Why do we use your data?
utilisation.description: Your data is subject to automated processing for the following purposes:

1.title: Matching
1.desc: Facilitate connection between owners and tenants, manage requests.

2.title: Identity verification
2.desc: Analyze your documents via OCR to assign the 'Verified' badge.

3.title: Reliability score
3.desc: Calculate your reliability score (0-100) for a trust system.

4.title: Security & Anti-fraud
4.desc: Detect fraudulent behavior and protect against scams.

5.title: Personalization
5.desc: Recommend ads tailored to your preferences.

6.title: Payments & Security deposit
6.desc: Process payments via Konnect, manage escrow.

7.title: Notifications
7.desc: Inform you of events related to your bookings.

8.title: Support & Disputes
8.desc: Process your tickets and arbitrate disputes.

cookies.title: Cookie policy
cookies.description: NestHub uses cookies to ensure the proper functioning of the site, measure audience, and offer you content tailored to your property searches.

essentiels.name: Essential Cookies
essentiels.desc: Necessary for navigation, authentication (Clerk), and session security.

analytiques.name: Analytical Cookies
analytiques.desc: To understand how you use our site and improve our services.

personnalisation.name: Personalization Cookies
personnalisation.desc: To remember your preferences and personalize recommendations.

droits.title: Your rights (GDPR)
droits.description: In accordance with data protection regulations, you have the following rights, all accessible from your personal NestHub space:

acces.title: Access
acces.desc: View all your personal data from your profile.

rectification.title: Rectification
rectification.desc: Correct your incorrect information in your settings.

suppression.title: Deletion
suppression.desc: Request the deletion of your account and your data.

portabilite.title: Portability
portabilite.desc: Export all your data in JSON/CSV format.

limitation.title: Restriction
limitation.desc: Request the restriction of processing in certain cases.

securite.title: Security of your data
securite.description: NestHub implements rigorous technical and organizational measures to guarantee the security of your data:

auth.title: Secure authentication
auth.desc: Session management via Clerk with 2FA support.

audits.title: Regular audits
audits.desc: Security audits and admin access logs maintained.

messagerie.title: Protected messaging
messagerie.desc: AI detects and masks sensitive data in chat.

paiements.title: Secure payments
paiements.desc: No banking data stored, everything is managed by Konnect.

ia.title: AI & Automation
ia.warning: NestHub uses artificial intelligence systems that automatically process some of your data.

detection.title: Data leak detection
detection.desc: Real-time analysis of messages to detect and mask sensitive data.

score.title: Automatic reliability score
score.desc: Automatic calculation of reliability score based on behavior.

fraude.title: Fraud detection
fraude.desc: Analysis of listings to detect suspicious behavior.

recommandations.title: Personalized recommendations
recommandations.desc: Use of browsing data to recommend listings.

contact.title: Need help with your data?
contact.description: Our Data Protection Officer (DPO) is available to answer any questions you may have about the collection, use, or deletion of your personal data.

VerifyCatch.description: Please wait while we verify your information!

results.title: Latest gems for you
results.noResultsHint: Try modifying your filters or your search

SearchPage.noResultsDesc1: No accommodation matches your current criteria
SearchPage.noResultsDesc3: Or adjust the number of bedrooms and guests
SearchPage.trustBadge1Text: Each accommodation is rigorously validated by our team
SearchPage.trustBadge2Text: An editorial selection of the most remarkable residences
SearchPage.categoryAllDesc: The full range of NESTHUB experiences
SearchPage.categoryVillaDesc: Private spaces, pool and garden for exceptional stays
SearchPage.categoryAppartementDesc: Modern comfort in the heart of cities
SearchPage.categoryMaisonDesc: Charm and authenticity in spacious residences
SearchPage.categoryStudioDesc: Smart solutions for short and long stays
SearchPage.categoriesDescription: Each category embodies a distinct universe: Mediterranean shores, ancestral heritage, contemporary splendor, absolute tranquility. This is how a search page transcends the ordinary to become memorable.
SearchPage.resultsDescription: Immersive storytelling, clear pricing hierarchy, trust indicators and visual rhythm — each result is designed to captivate your gaze.
SearchPage.ambitionText: Our ambition goes beyond simple inventory filtering. We want to make every search result reliable, desirable and deeply persuasive.
SearchPage.absoluteReliabilityText: Reliability scores, authentication badges and visual hierarchy eliminate any hesitation.
SearchPage.editorialExperienceText: Immersive photography, airy spacing and captivating storytelling awaken desire before any price comparison.
SearchPage.luxuryAmbassadorText: An interface that wants to be curatorial, distinctive — the perfect embodiment of an exceptional search.
SearchPage.footerText: The art of discovering the most remarkable stays in Tunisia, where each property tells a unique story and each stay becomes an unforgettable memory.
SearchPage.heroSlide1Subtitle: Exceptional homes and authentic retreats for unforgettable vacations
SearchPage.heroSlide2Subtitle: Each property is subject to rigorous verification for your peace of mind
SearchPage.heroSlide3Title: Discreet elegance, just a click away
SearchPage.heroSlide3Subtitle: Refine your search by destination, amenities and budget to find the rare gem

FavoritesPage.title: Your
FavoritesPage.description: Find all the accommodations you've liked here. Compare them, share them, and go to booking with one click.

ComparePage.reviewTextDefault: {title} is an exceptional property. With {rating}/5 stars, it's a perfect choice for a quality stay. I highly recommend it!
ComparePage.bottomInsight: All criteria are aligned so you can objectively compare and choose the accommodation that best suits your expectations.

MapPage.defaultDescription: Magnificent property with all modern amenities for a comfortable stay.
MapPage.footerText:
The trusted platform for renting exceptional properties in Tunisia.
© 2024 NestHub. All rights reserved.
MapPage.heroSlide1Subtitle: Unique properties carefully selected to offer you the best of Tunisian hospitality.
MapPage.heroSlide2Subtitle: Spaces designed to live unforgettable experiences, between tradition and modernity.
MapPage.heroSlide3Subtitle: Verified properties and passionate hosts for a completely serene stay.
MapPage.categoriesDescription: Immerse yourself in unique universes, each telling a different story. From the authentic charm of the Medina to the contemporary luxury of Gammarth.
MapPage.resultsDescription: Each property is verified and photographed by us to guarantee exceptional image quality.
MapPage.ambitionText: Our ambition: to revolutionize the rental experience in Tunisia with a platform combining design, trust and high standards.
MapPage.absoluteReliabilityText: Each listing is manually verified by our team. Over 98% satisfaction.
MapPage.editorialExperienceText: Professional photos and detailed descriptions for each property.
MapPage.luxuryAmbassadorText: A demanding selection of the most beautiful properties in Tunisia.

features.title: A new way to
features.subtitle: NESTHUB uses artificial intelligence to offer you exceptional properties perfectly suited to your criteria.

geolocation.title: Precise geolocation
geolocation.desc: Find properties exactly where you want with our interactive map.

recommendations.title: Smart recommendations
recommendations.desc: Our AI analyzes your preferences to suggest the most suitable properties.

filters.title: Advanced search filters

booking.title: Express booking
booking.desc: Instant confirmation in a few clicks with our simplified process.

services.title: An intelligent platform for
services.subtitle: NESTHUB revolutionizes rental in Tunisia by centralizing listings, verifying users and securing transactions.

verification.title: OCR verification and reliability scoring
verification.desc: No more fake accounts or scams. Each user is automatically rated according to their history for a 100% reliable community.

detection.title: AI-powered leak detection
detection.desc: Your personal data protected. AI automatically blocks numbers and emails in messages. Exchange in complete peace of mind.

payment.title: Secure payment with Stripe
payment.desc: Pay online with confidence. Secure transactions, data protection, integrated cancellation and refund.

ai.title: AI for everyone
ai.desc: For owners: automatic suggestion of the ideal price when posting a listing based on the market.

reviews.title: Bilateral reviews
reviews.desc: Owners and tenants rate each other. Together, let's build a trusted community based on verified reviews.

dashboard.title: Complete owner dashboard
dashboard.desc: Manage your listings, view your bookings and track your revenue in real time. Everything is centralized in a dedicated space.

whyUs.title: Why work
whyUs.subtitle: Discover why thousands of clients trust us for their real estate projects.

listings.title: Large selection of premium properties
listings.desc: Villas, dars, upscale apartments: find the rare gem among our thousands of verified listings in Tunisia.

expert.title: Certified expert support
expert.desc: Personalized advice and AI recommendations to successfully complete your real estate project with complete peace of mind.

verified.title: 100% verified listings
verified.desc: Authentic photos, consistent prices, certified owners. Our anti-fraud system filters every listing.

fast.title: Fast and reliable service
fast.desc: Book in a few clicks, confirm instantly, chat live. Responsive customer support 7/7.

modal.description: You have access to both NESTHUB universes. Where do you want to go?

NexusCard.badge: YOU HAVE THE MOST BEAUTIFUL PART
NexusCard.description: Your dar in the Medina, your villa in Gammarth — they have a soul, not a calendar. We find those who deserve it. You, you cash in.
NexusCard.footerText: Transform the soul of your place into income

ProfilePage.aboutTitle: A profile that inspires trust even before the first message
ProfilePage.aboutDescription: The page highlights the essentials without overwhelming the reading: a clear bio, useful information and trust signals readable at a glance.
ProfilePage.trustTitle: Quality indicators visible without visual noise
ProfilePage.trustDescription: Trust data is presented as a discreet dashboard, to maintain elegant and fast reading.
ProfilePage.listingsDescription: Each listing is presented as a simple and readable object, with a strong image, a few useful details and a direct call to action.
ProfilePage.noListingsHint: This host hasn't published any listings yet.
ProfilePage.reviewsDescriptionTenant: Feedback from hosts who have hosted this traveler. Trust is mutual.
ProfilePage.reviewsDescriptionHost: Testimonials from travelers who have stayed with this host. Service quality is read here.
ProfilePage.noReviewsHint: Be the first to leave a review!
ProfilePage.messagePlaceholder: Hello @{username}, I'm interested in your accommodation...
